data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: EXTL3ΔN purification from EXT1 CRISPR HEK
project.projectDescription: Experiment for label-free quantification of contaminants in preparations of EXTL3ΔN from transgenic HEK cells. EXTL3ΔN-expressing HEK cells were not untreated (untransfected / Batch C), treated with a set of CRISPR control plasmids (CRISPR control / Batch A), or treated with a set of CRISPR plasmids targeting EXT1 (CRISPR EXT1 / Batch B). EXTL3ΔN was then purified by HisTrap and size exclusion before analysing by mass spectrometry.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein reduced and alkylated before digestion with trypsin. Peptides separated by LC-MS/MS.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Data processed using Protein Discoverer. All data searched against cRAP, Uniprot human, and SWISS-Prot human databases using MASCOT. Peak areas for each peptide were combined to calculate protein abundance.

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: Department of Biochemistry, University of Cambridge, United Kingdom
labPIs.name: Paul Dupree

references.referenceLine: Wilson LFL, Dendooven T, Hardwick SW, Echevarría-Poza A, Tryfona T, Krogh KBRM, Chirgadze DY, Luisi BF, Logan DT, Mani K, Dupree P. The structure of EXTL3 helps to explain the different roles of bi-domain exostosins in heparan sulfate synthesis. Nat Commun. 2022 13(1):3314

Characteristics[CellLine]: human embryonic kidney cells (expressing the Epstein-Barr virus nuclear antigen-1; EBNA 293)
Characteristics[GeneticModification]: a cDNA encoding amino acids 52–919 of human EXTL3
Comment[Instrument]: Dionex Ultimate 3000 RSLC nanoUPLC (Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc, Waltham, MA, USA)
Q Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc, Waltham, MA, USA)
Comment[FlowRateChromatogram]: at a flow rate of 300 nl min−1
Comment[GradientTime]: The linear gradient employed was 2–40% B in 30 min.
a total run time of 60 min.
Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer]: Orbitrap analyser, set at a resolution of 17,500
